quotes.quote: **13 Year Old Boy** swam 4 hours to save his mom and siblings: **'I don't think** it was me who did it, **it was God the whole time'**

**The day will come** when I won't be a part of any football team. But the decision I made during my sophomore year in high school to **be a part of Team Jesus,** I'll be a part of that team **for the rest of my life,** and **for all eternity.**
